next_steps: Perform esophagogastroduodenoscopy (EGD) to evaluate for bezoar and perform mucosal biopsies
Perform serum celiac serology (anti-tissue transglutaminase IgA)
Obtain urine porphobilinogen and delta-aminolevulinic acid levels
Obtain toxicology screen to assess for cannabinoid metabolites
Perform thorough psychiatric and behavioral assessment regarding current pica/trichophagia
Initiate nutritional support and monitor for weight loss/anorexia
